ddls:
CREATE TABLE "factions" (
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faction */,
  "faction_name" TEXT /* Name of the faction */,
  "faction_leader" TEXT /* Name of the faction leader */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the faction was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the faction's headquarters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faction */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the faction is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "faction_id" INTEGER /* Faction the spacecraft belongs to */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the spacecraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the spacecraft */,
  "manufactured_by" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the spacecraft */,
  "first_deployed" TEXT /* Date the spacecraft was first deployed */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the spacecraft is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spacecraft_faction_id FOREIGN KEY ("faction_id") REFERENCES factions ("faction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kills" (
  "kill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kill */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the kill */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the kill */,
  "reward" INTEGER /* Reward amount for the kill */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total bounty amount for the spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Spacecraft ID of the killed spacecraft */,
  "wing" TEXT /* Whether the kill was made in a wing */,
  "killer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the kill */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the kill occurred */,
  "kill_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the kill */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the kill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kills_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kills_killer_id FOREIGN KEY ("killer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bounties" (
  "bounty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bounty */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Spacecraft ID the bounty is placed on */,
  "bounty_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the bounty */,
  "placed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who placed the bounty */,
  "placement_date" TEXT /* Date the bounty was placed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the bounty expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bounty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bounty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bounties_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout */,
  "kill_id" INTEGER /* Kill ID the payout is for */,
  "payout_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payout */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the payout was made */,
  "payer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payout */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the payout */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of payout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_payer_id FOREIGN KEY ("payer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_kill_id FOREIGN KEY ("kill_id") REFERENCES kills ("kill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, faction leader) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
